summary: Iteration 52: Position Lifecycle Management for Weather Strategies fully verified. All 19 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI verified: LIFECYCLE TAG ONLY badge visible, all lifecycle columns present (Mult, Edge Now, Decay, Status), Exit filter button shows count and filters correctly to 1 exit candidate (8.32x profit_capture), Best Multiple sort button works. The 54 weather positions are now evaluated with 1 exit candidate triggered at 8.32x (>2.0 threshold).

backend_api_tests: exit-candidates has required fields (mode, config, candidates, total_evaluated, shadow_exits) - PASS
Config has correct thresholds: profit_capture=2.0, max_neg_edge=-100, edge_decay=0.60, time_ineff=18h - PASS
candidates is a list (has 1 candidate) - PASS
lifecycle has required fields (mode, evaluations, metrics, config) - PASS
evaluations have correct structure (profit_multiple, edge_at_entry, current_edge_bps, edge_decay_pct, is_exit_candidate, exit_reason) - PASS
Weather positions have lifecycle field - PASS
Lifecycle objects have correct structure with 9 fields - PASS
Non-weather positions (crypto, arb) have null lifecycle - PASS
Response includes lifecycle summary (mode='tag_only', exit_candidates=1) - PASS
Asymmetric positions have null lifecycle (never evaluated for exit) - PASS
Exit candidates count (1) matches actual is_exit_candidate=true positions - PASS
Profit capture at 2x: position with 8.32x has exit_reason='profit_capture' - PASS
Exit reason values are valid enum values - PASS
frontend_ui_tests: Weather page loads with Open Positions tab showing 54 positions - PASS
LIFECYCLE TAG ONLY badge visible with '1 exit candidate' text - PASS
All lifecycle columns present: Mult, Edge Now, Decay, Status - PASS
Best Multiple sort button present and clickable - PASS
EXIT: Profit Capture badge shows with correct emerald styling - PASS
Exit filter correctly shows only 1 position (8.32x Chicago 18-19°F) - PASS
Footer shows: 15 near, 0 medium, 39 long, 1 exit candidate, lifecycle: tag_only - PASS

details: GET /api/positions/weather/exit-candidates returns mode='tag_only'
Config thresholds: profit_capture_threshold=2.0, max_negative_edge_bps=-100, edge_decay_exit_pct=0.60, time_inefficiency_hours=18
1 exit candidate returned (8.32x profit_capture)
total_evaluated=54 (all weather positions evaluated)
shadow_exits=[] (no shadow exits yet in tag_only mode)
GET /api/positions/weather/lifecycle returns 54 evaluations
Each evaluation has: token_id, strategy_id, is_exit_candidate, exit_reason, profit_multiple, edge_at_entry, current_edge_bps, edge_decay_pct, current_model_prob, time_held_hours, lifecycle_mode
metrics: positions_evaluated=54, exit_candidates=1, shadow_exits=0, auto_exits=0
Weather positions include lifecycle object
Lifecycle has: is_exit_candidate, exit_reason, profit_multiple, edge_at_entry, current_edge_bps, edge_decay_pct, current_model_prob, time_held_hours, lifecycle_mode
Response includes lifecycle summary: mode='tag_only', exit_candidates=1
Non-weather positions have null lifecycle
Asymmetric positions (weather_asymmetric) are NEVER evaluated for exit
They have lifecycle=null in the API response
This is by design - asymmetric positions hold to resolution
One position at 8.32x profit_multiple (entry 0.0601, current 0.5000)
Correctly tagged as is_exit_candidate=true with exit_reason='profit_capture'
Threshold of 2.0x is working correctly
LIFECYCLE TAG ONLY badge visible with correct styling
Lifecycle columns (Mult, Edge Now, Decay, Status) in positions table
Exit (1) filter button filters to exit candidates only
Best Multiple sort option available
EXIT: Profit Capture badge with emerald color for 8.32x position
Footer summary shows exit candidate count and lifecycle mode

test_credentials: None required - paper mode, no auth
seed_data_creation: None - tested with live MongoDB data (54 open weather positions)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 52 verified Position Lifecycle Management for weather strategies. Key findings: (1) Default lifecycle_mode is 'tag_only' (observe and tag, no auto-selling). (2) All 54 weather positions are evaluated, 1 exit candidate at 8.32x profit_capture. (3) Config thresholds: profit_capture=2.0x, max_negative_edge=-100bps, edge_decay=60%, time_inefficiency=18h. (4) Asymmetric positions (weather_asymmetric) are NEVER evaluated for exit - they have null lifecycle. (5) Frontend shows LIFECYCLE TAG ONLY badge, Mult/Edge Now/Decay/Status columns, Exit(1) filter, Best Multiple sort. (6) Exit candidate badge shows 'EXIT: Profit Capture' with emerald styling. (7) Available modes: off, tag_only, shadow_exit, auto_exit.
